mapper.select: SELECT TOP(3) MessageID, Name, Subject, Detail, SendDate, IsRead, UserImageUrl FROM Message INNER JOIN AppUser ON Message.Sender = AppUser.UserId WHERE Receiver = #{id} ORDER BY MessageID DESC
SELECT MessageID, Name, Subject, Detail, SendDate, IsRead, UserImageUrl FROM Message INNER JOIN AppUser ON Message.Sender = AppUser.UserId WHERE Receiver = #{id} ORDER BY SendDate DESC
SELECT MessageID, Name, Subject, Detail, SendDate, IsRead, UserImageUrl FROM Message INNER JOIN AppUser ON Message.Receiver = AppUser.UserId WHERE Sender = #{id} ORDER BY SendDate DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Message (Sender, Receiver, Subject, Detail, SendDate, IsRead) VALUES (#{sender}, #{receiver}, #{subject}, #{detail}, #{sendDate}, #{isRead})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM Message INNER JOIN AppUser ON Message.Sender = AppUser.UserId WHERE MessageID = #{messageId}
SELECT UserId FROM AppUser WHERE Email = #{email}
